table.style: padding-top: 16px; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-family: 'Lucica Grande', Ubuntu, Arial, Verdana, sans-serif; color: rgb(34, 34, 34); width: 100%; border-collapse:separate;

td.p: Internal communication: Replying will post an internal note. Followers won't receive any email notification.

table.style: padding-top: 16px; background-color: #F1F1F1; font-family:Verdana, Arial,sans-serif; color: #454748; width: 100%; border-collapse:separate;

td.div:
Dear ${object.name},
A password reset was requested for the ${object.get_powerby_title()} account linked to this email. You may change your password by following this link which will remain valid during 24 hours:
Change password
If you do not expect this, you can safely ignore this email.
Thanks, % if user.signature:
${user.signature | safe} % endif

table.style: min-width: 590px; background-color: white; font-size: 11px; padding: 0px 8px 0px 8px; border-collapse:separate;

record.field: ${object.create_uid.name} from ${object.company_id.name} invites you to connect to ${object.get_powerby_title()}

table.style: padding-top: 16px; background-color: #F1F1F1; font-family:Verdana, Arial,sans-serif; color: #454748; width: 100%; border-collapse:separate;
min-width: 590px; background-color: white; font-size: 11px; padding: 0px 8px 0px 8px; border-collapse:separate;
padding-top: 16px; background-color: #F1F1F1; font-family:Verdana, Arial,sans-serif; color: #454748; width: 100%; border-collapse:separate;

td.div:
Dear ${object.name},
Your account has been successfully created!
Your login is ${object.email}
To gain access to your account, you can use the following link:
Go to My Account
Thanks,
% if user.signature:
${user.signature | safe} % endif

table.style: min-width: 590px; background-color: white; font-size: 11px; padding: 0px 8px 0px 8px; border-collapse:separate;
padding-top: 16px; background-color: #F1F1F1; font-family:Verdana, Arial,sans-serif; color: #454748; width: 100%; border-collapse:separate;
min-width: 590px; background-color: white; font-size: 11px; padding: 0px 8px 0px 8px; border-collapse:separate;
padding-top: 16px; background-color: #F1F1F1; font-family:Verdana, Arial,sans-serif; color: #454748; width: 100%; border-collapse:separate;

td.span: Your % if object.move_type == 'out_refund': Credit Note % else: Journal Entry %endif

div.p:
Dear % if object.partner_id.parent_id: ${object.partner_id.name} (${object.partner_id.parent_id.name}), % else: ${object.partner_id.name}, % endif
Here is your % if object.name: invoice ${object.name} % else: invoice %endif % if object.invoice_origin: (with reference: ${object.invoice_origin}) % endif amounting in ${format_amount(object.amount_total, object.currency_id)} from ${object.company_id.name}. % if object.payment_state in ('paid', 'in_payment'): This invoice is already paid. % else: Please remit payment at your earliest convenience. % if object.payment_reference:
Please use the following communication for your payment: ${object.payment_reference}. % endif % endif
Do not hesitate to contact us if you have any questions. % if object.invoice_user_id.signature:
${object.invoice_user_id.signature | safe} % endif

record.field: Payment Receipt: Send by Mass email

table.style: padding-top: 16px; background-color: #F1F1F1; font-family:Verdana, Arial,sans-serif; color: #454748; width: 100%; border-collapse:separate;

div.p:
Dear ${object.partner_id.name}
Thank you for your payment. Here is your payment receipt ${(object.name or '').replace('/','-')} amounting to ${format_amount(object.amount, object.currency_id)} from ${object.company_id.name}.
Do not hesitate to contact us if you have any questions.
Best regards, % if user.signature:
${user.signature | safe} % endif
